spaceflight.title: Fighting Fire With Fire
spaceflight.summary: In fire-prone ecosystems in Australia’s Northern Territory, prescribed burns are lit to minimize the severity of fires later in the season.

spaceflight.title: NASA head urges new launcher for Blue Origin’s moon landers to meet Artemis mission deadlines
spaceflight.summary: The change was confirmed by the agency a week after a New Glenn testing explosion destroyed the rocket and damaged Launch Complex 36.

spaceflight.title: NASA-Funded Study Shows Wildfire Smoke’s Hidden Ozone Toll
spaceflight.summary: Over the last decade, wildfires have worsened ground-level ozone pollution across much of the contiguous United States, creating unhealthy air far from active flames.
